# MuleSoft Microsoft .NET Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.1) of Microsoft .NET Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft .NET Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dotnet-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft .NET Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft .NET Connector 3.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dotnet-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft .NET Connector 3.1 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dotnet-connector/latest/microsoft-dotnet-connector-examples.md)
- [Microsoft .NET Connector 3.1 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dotnet-connector/latest/microsoft-dotnet-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Microsoft .NET Connector 3.1](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dotnet-connector/latest/microsoft-dotnet-connector-studio.md)
- [Microsoft .NET Connector 3.1 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/microsoft-dotnet-connector/latest/microsoft-dotnet-connector-xml-maven.md)
